name: Garlicky Stuffed Steak - Menu #1
recipeIngredient: 6 tablespoons Fresh parsley; minced and divided
1 small Red or green bell pepper, diced
2 1/2 pounds Bottom round steak, 2 inches thick
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400 degrees F.
2. In a large bowl, combine 3/4 cup bread crumbs, 6 tablespoons parsley, 1 teaspoon salt, and 1 teaspoon pepper.
3. In a small skillet, melt 3 tablespoons butter over low heat. Add diced red bell pepper and minced garlic. Cook, stirring occasionally, until the pepper softens, about 8 minutes. Remove from heat and stir in the bread crumb mixture. Let cool to room temperature.
4. Place the steak on a work surface. Cut a pocket into the meat by slicing almost halfway through lengthwise. Open the pocket and spoon in the stuffing. Tie securely with kitchen string.
5. Melt 1 tablespoon butter and brush over the steak. Combine the remaining bread crumbs, parsley, salt, and pepper. Roll the steak in the breadcrumb mixture to coat evenly. Place on a rack set in a roasting pan.
6. Cook for 18 to 20 minutes per side until medium-rare. Ready to serve in 1 hour 15 minutes.
